title: SPower
description:
SPower adds three legendary power weapons to your Minecraft server with unique abilities, stunning particle effects, and complete customization options.

🔱 POWER TRIDENT
• Lightning Strike - Summon devastating lightning that breaks blocks and damages enem
body:
# ⚡ SPower - Professional Power Weapons Plugin

A premium-quality Minecraft plugin featuring customizable power weapons with stunning particle effects, special abilities, and GUI-based customization.

## ✨ Features

### 🔱 Power Trident
- **Circular rotating particles** around the player when held
- **Lightning strike** on left-click at target location
- **Riptide flight** on right-click
- **Customizable particles** via GUI
- Configurable damage, cooldown, and particle effects

### ⚔️ Power Sword
- **Enhanced melee damage** with particle effects
- **Fireball attack** on left-click - shoots explosive fireballs
- **Ranged beam attack** on right-click - devastating energy beam
- **Fire circle** on shift/crouch - creates expanding fire ring with damage
- **Dual particle customization** (hit & ranged)
- Configurable damage values and cooldowns

### 🔨 Power Mace (Thor's Hammer)
- **Throw mechanic** - Right-click to throw forward with return
- **Super jump** - Press F (swap hands) to jump high
- **Ground slam** - Landing breaks nearby blocks
- **Customizable particles** for jump and throw

### 🛡️ Power Totem
- **Protection Circle** - Rotating particle shield around player
- **Crown Particles** - Golden crown effect above head
- **Extra Hearts** - +5 yellow hearts when held in offhand
- **Damage Aura** - Enemies inside circle take damage
- **Mobile Protection** - Effects follow player movement
- Hold in offhand to activate all effects

## 🎮 Commands

| Command | Description | Permission |
|---------|-------------|------------|
| `/spower` | Main command menu with help | `spower.admin` |
| `/spower give <player/@a> <weapon>` | Give power weapon | `spower.admin` |
| `/spower reload` | Reload all configs | `spower.admin` |
| `/tridentpower` | Open trident GUI | `spower.use` |
| `/swordpower` | Open sword GUI | `spower.use` |
| `/mace` | Open mace GUI | `spower.use` |
| `/totempower` | Open totem info GUI | `spower.use` |

**Command Aliases:**
- `/sp`, `/power` → `/spower`
- `/tpower`, `/trident` → `/tridentpower`
- `/swpower`, `/sword` → `/swordpower`
- `/macepower`, `/hammer` → `/mace`

## 🔐 Permissions

- `spower.admin` - Access to admin commands (default: op)
- `spower.use` - Use power weapons and GUIs (default: true)

## ⚙️ Configuration

### config.yml
Configure damage values, cooldowns, particle settings, materials, and more. Full customization for each weapon.

### particles.yml
Define available particle types for each weapon in the GUI selection menu.

### messages.yml
Customize titles, subtitles, and chat messages with hex color support.

## 🎨 Features Highlights

✅ **Tab Completion** - Smart command suggestions  
✅ **Hex Color Support** - Beautiful gradient colors  
✅ **GUI Customization** - Easy particle selection  
✅ **Persistent Data** - Player preferences saved  
✅ **Performance Optimized** - Smooth particle effects  
✅ **Fully Configurable** - Every aspect customizable  
✅ **Professional Design** - Small caps font styling  

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the latest release
2. Place `SPower.jar` in your server's `plugins` folder
3. Restart or reload your server
4. Configure settings in `plugins/SPower/`
5. Use `/spower give @p <weapon>` to get started!

## 🔧 Requirements

- **Minecraft:** 1.19+ (Paper/Spigot)
- **Java:** 17+

## 📝 Support

For issues, suggestions, or contributions, please open an issue on the project page.

## 📜 License

All rights reserved.
